sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports feeling anxious and fatigued. He also reports difficulty sleeping, describing it as 'not restful.' The patient reports hypertension and diabetes. He states he drinks about a beer a day and smokes one to two cigarettes a day. The patient used to party and use iv drugs several years ago. The patient reports feeling good currently.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The patient has a two out of six systolic murmur. The patient's AST is elevated at 39. The patient's HCV antibody test is positive.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has hepatitis C, depression, hypertension, diabetes, and anxiety. The patient's elevated AST suggests possible liver involvement.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: A cervical MRI is planned. The doctor orders Hepc RNA testing. The doctor orders HCV genotype testing. The doctor orders a fibrosis ultrasound. Start Hepc RNA testing.
